vision_intro_bold: We represent the students’ perspective within the university and ensure that students’ voices are heard: policy should be made not about students, but with them.
vision_about_vuur:
Lijst VUUR is a progressive student party committed to high-quality education: up-to-date, inclusive and innovative. We are dedicated to a university that is accessible to everyone – regardless of background, identity or circumstances. We want a democratic academic community that takes responsibility for people, society and the climate.

An environment with diverse perspectives, where there is room for wonder, debate and activism. That is what we stand for.
contact_form_description: Do you have any questions about the party, the vision, or anything else? Ask your question here and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible!
contact_form_input: What can we help you with?*
contact_form_input_placeholder: I want to know more about...
kernwaarden_4_rule_content: VUUR considers high-quality education to be of the utmost importance. We must not only invest in the quality of education, but also in its accessibility, relevance and forward-thinking nature. Diversity and innovation are central to VUUR’s vision for the education of the future. There must always be sufficient support for both individual students and lecturers. By investing in quality education, we are building a future in which every student has the opportunity to develop to their full potential.
